title: The Warning
writer: H. Milner Kitchin, Lillian Ducey, George B. Seitz
actors: Jack Holt, Dorothy Revier, Frank Lackteen
plot: This story of the British Silent Service operating on the coast of China finds Tom Fellows, captain of an opium-smuggling ship, going into a notorious Chinese joint called "The House of a Thousand Delights," where he finds a beaut...
